docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUEXO, JOSE GARCIA, MIGUEL GARCIA, EDGARDO AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, MELISSA GARCIA, VERONICA DOES 1-25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-20-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-22-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       AUG-22-2002
